ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user is a superuser */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user is a staff member */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user's account is active */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user's account is valid */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "account_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, owner, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's account was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, pending, banned) */,
  "password_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's password is set to expire */,
  "last_password_reset" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last reset their password */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the user */,
  "locked_until" TEXT /* Date and time until when the user's account is locked due to excessive failed login attempts */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account (e.g., free, premium, enterprise) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the user account */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the profile belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, client, owner) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the login attempt */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the login attempt */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the login attempt was successful */,
  "login_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the login attempt was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for the login attempt */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the login attempt record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the login attempt record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_tokens" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the token belongs to */,
  "token" TEXT /* Password reset token */,
  "expiration_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the token expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the password reset token record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the password reset token record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_verifications" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email verification record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the record belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address being verified */,
  "verification_code" TEXT /* Verification code sent to the user */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the email address has been verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the email verification record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the email verification record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_verifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit trail record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit trail record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "integration_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the integration */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the integration was established */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the integration record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the integration record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_incidents" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security incident */,
  "incident_name" TEXT /* Name of the security incident */,
  "incident_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the security incident */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the security incident occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the security incident record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the security incident record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
